GeneDef.label: xenotypes researcher
GeneDef.description: Carriers of this gene have archites that can freely edit the owner's xenogenes.

customEffectDescriptions.li: Slowly researching new xenotypes for the <color=#8a8ae6>energyshifter</color> gene.
Once a day, the map is scanned and a list of <color=#8a8ae6>pawns for research</color> is compiled.
Every few hours, one <color=#8a8ae6>unknown gene</color> is researched.
When a full set of genes is <color=#8a8ae6>collected</color>, a xenotype is <color=#8a8ae6>unlocked</color>.
Any xenotypes and genes that the <color=#8a8ae6>energyshifter</color> has not yet received will be researched, regardless of whether they are default.
Researched genes can be implanted with the <color=#8a8ae6>xenogenes editor</color> gene.
